audience: Founders who created one workspace but have been inactive for 30 days
input: Write a respectful winback email that helps a founder resume unfinished campaign planning.
body: Your launch brief is still waiting with the audience, offer, and first campaign notes you added. Open the brief to pick up where you left off, or reply with what changed and we will suggest the next best step.
output: Pick up your launch brief Your launch brief is still waiting with the audience, offer, and first campaign notes you added. Open the brief to pick up where you left off, or reply with what changed and we will suggest the next best step.

audience: Marketing operators who connected data but stopped before launching a lifecycle map
input: Write a winback email that gets an operator to continue setup.
subject_line: Your lifecycle map is almost usable
body: You connected the customer source, but the activation and winback segments are still empty. Review the suggested segments and continue setup when you have five minutes. The draft map will be saved where you left it.
output: Your lifecycle map is almost usable You connected the customer source, but the activation and winback segments are still empty. Review the suggested segments and continue setup when you have five minutes. The draft map will be saved where you left it.

audience: Revenue leaders who viewed reports but have not returned in 45 days
input: Write a concise email that gets a revenue leader back into weekly campaign reporting.
body: The campaign report you viewed last month has new movement: two segments improved and one offer is underperforming. Open the report to review what changed before your next growth meeting.
output: Your campaign risks changed The campaign report you viewed last month has new movement: two segments improved and one offer is underperforming. Open the report to review what changed before your next growth meeting.
